scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:types && npm run check:purity && npm run check:pinned-deps && npm run check:shrinkwrap
scripts.check:types: tsc -p packages/kernel/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/kernel/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/host-node/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/host-browser/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/host-weapp/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/host-rn/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ext-subagents/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ext-mcp/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ext-mcp-http/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/ext-resources/tsconfig.json && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: node --test packages/kernel/test/*.test.ts packages/host-node/test/*.test.ts packages/host-browser/test/*.test.ts packages/host-weapp/test/*.test.ts packages/host-rn/test/*.test.ts packages/cli/test/*.test.ts packages/ext-subagents/test/*.test.ts packages/ext-mcp/test/*.test.ts packages/ext-mcp-http/test/*.test.ts packages/ext-resources/test/*.test.ts
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version --ignore-scripts && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts && npm run shrinkwrap:cli
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version --ignore-scripts && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts && npm run shrinkwrap:cli
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version --ignore-scripts && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts && npm run shrinkwrap:cli
